info.title: Kling Multi Image-to-Image Task - Submit Task
info.description: Submit a Kling native multi image-to-image task via `/kling/v1/images/multi-image2image`.

post.description: Submit a Kling native multi image-to-image task via `/kling/v1/images/multi-image2image`.

value.prompt: Wearing a flowing red dress, in a grassland, Ghibli style.

bearerAuth.description: Pass `Authorization: Bearer <token>` in the request header.

prompt.description:
Positive text prompt
- Must not exceed 2500 characters.

negative_prompt.description:
Negative text prompt
- Must not exceed 2500 characters.

subject_image.description: Subject image URL or Base64 string.

subject_image_list.description:
Subject reference image list

- Supports up to 4 images, minimum 1 image. Use key:value format:
`"subject_image_list":[  { "subject_image":"image_url" },  { "subject_image":"image_url" },  { "subject_image":"image_url" },  { "subject_image":"image_url" }]`
- No cropping logic on the API side — please upload pre-selected subject images directly
- Supports image Base64 encoding or image URL (must be accessible)
- Note: When using Base64, do not add any prefix (such as data:image/png;base64,) before the Base64 string — pass the Base64 encoded string directly.
- Correct Base64 parameter:

`iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAAUA...`

- Incorrect Base64 parameter (contains data: prefix):

`data:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAAUA...`

- Supported image formats: .jpg / .jpeg / .png
- Image file size must not exceed 10MB, image dimensions must be at least 300px, aspect ratio between 1:2.5 ~ 2.5:1

scene_image.description:
Scene reference image

- Supports image Base64 encoding or image URL (must be accessible)
- Note: When using Base64, do not add any prefix (such as data:image/png;base64,) before the Base64 string — pass the Base64 encoded string directly.
- Correct Base64 parameter:

`iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAAUA...`

- Incorrect Base64 parameter (contains data: prefix):

`data:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAAUA...`

- Supported image formats: .jpg / .jpeg / .png
- Image file size must not exceed 10MB, image dimensions must be at least 300px, aspect ratio between 1:2.5 ~ 2.5:1

- Supports image Base64 encoding or image URL (must be accessible)
- Note: When using Base64, do not add any prefix (such as data:image/png;base64,) before the Base64 string — pass the Base64 encoded string directly.
- Correct Base64 parameter:

- Supported image formats: .jpg / .jpeg / .png
- Image file size must not exceed 10MB, image dimensions must be at least 300px, aspect ratio between 1:2.5 ~ 2.5:1

watermark_info.description:
Whether to also generate a watermarked result.
- Defined via the enabled parameter:

```json
 "watermark_info": { "enabled": boolean } ```

- true to generate, false to not generate
- Custom watermarks are not currently supported

enabled.description: true to generate watermarked result, false to not generate.

callback_url.description: Callback notification URL for this task. If configured, the server will proactively notify when the task status changes.

external_task_id.description:
Custom task ID.
- Does not override the system-generated task ID, but supports querying by this ID.
- Must be unique per user.

error.description: Error details returned by the gateway or upstream provider.

code.description: Error code; see error codes for details.

request_id.description: Request ID, system-generated, used for request tracking and troubleshooting.

created_at.description: Task creation time, Unix timestamp in milliseconds.

updated_at.description: Task update time, Unix timestamp in milliseconds.
